title: Jabba's architect
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Architect.jpg|thumb]]

[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] hired a '''famous architect''' to design the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This architect may be [[Derren Flet/Legends|Derren Flet]]. However, a connection between these two characters has not yet been established in canon.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 8|''Star Wars'' (1998) 8]] {{1st}}
